holdings.infoBox: GUSE is an equity ETF with a total of 123 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.79%, Apple at 6.39%, Microsoft at 4.45%, Amazon.com at 3.90%, and Alphabet at 3.56%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Enhanced U.S. Equity ETF (GUSE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests in a diverse portfolio of US equities considered to be high quality companies poised for long-term growth GUSE was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
